headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 31 points, Reed Sheppard scored the final 11 points of the third quarter to blow open a close game, and the Houston Rockets rolled past the Denver Nuggets 115-101 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durant scores 31, Sheppard's 11-point flurry helps Rockets end Nuggets' 6-game win streak, 115-101

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 38 points, including seven during a key fourth-quarter stretch, and VJ Edgecombe added 26 as the Philadelphia 76ers defeated the Dallas Mavericks 121-114 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyrese Maxey scores 38 points to lead 76ers to 121-114 win over Mavericks

headlines.description: — Payton Pritchard scored 19 of his 33 points in the third quarter, Derrick White and Anfernee Simons each had 15, and the short-handed Boston Celtics beat the slumping Toronto Raptors 112-96 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Payton Pritchard scores 33 points as short-handed Celtics beat slumping Raptors 112-96

events.name: Indiana Pacers at New Orleans Pelicans

headlines.description: — Zion Williamson came off the bench for the third consecutive game and matched his season high with 29 points as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Indiana Pacers 128-109 on Saturday night for their season-high fourth straight win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zion Williamson ties season high with 29 points as Pelicans beat Pacers 128-109 for 4th straight win

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham had a triple-double and Jalen Duren added 19 points and 11 rebounds as the Detroit Pistons beat the Charlotte Hornets 112-86 on Saturday night.

events.name: Phoenix Suns at Golden State Warriors

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry had 28 points, nine rebounds and six assists, Jimmy Butler scored 25 points, and the Golden State Warriors snapped a three-game losing streak by beating the Phoenix Suns 119-116 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Butler, Curry lead Warriors past Suns 119-116 in teams' second straight physical game

events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Sacramento Kings

headlines.description: — Deni Avdija had 24 points, 10 assists and seven rebounds and the Portland Trail Blazers beat the Sacramento Kings 98-93 on Saturday night to sweep a home-and-home series.

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored a season-high 32 points and the slumping Los Angeles Clippers rode their 3-point shooting to a 103-88 victory over LeBron James and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night, snapping a five-game skid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard has season-high 32 points as Clippers beat Lakers 103-88 to snap 5-game skid
